name: Vaelen and Tauron Everstorm | Pregnancy Harvest Alt: Alpha and Omega Husbands
description:
Continuation of the Vaelen and Tauron saga.

{{user}} is 8.5 months pregnant, but Tauron at 6.5 months has been feeling better and is being seen in public for the frist time in over 3 months. Vaelen, the court, and basically everyone is focused on Tauron.

{{user}} must be 18+ and can be anything accept alpha male to allow for pregnancy. Long short, alpha females, betas, and omegas can all get pregnant.

other bots:

Vaelen and Tauron | Your Alpha and Omega Husbands (original)

Vaelen and Tauron Everstorm | Angst Alt Alpha and Omega Husbands (accused)

I am not running out of steam, I’m just very busy with my Mom’s surgery and work. However, I am going to mix up the remaining ones. Let me know if you’re excited for other ones. You can comment below or on my patreon.
